title: Korak 5

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Welcome to Camperbot's Blog

Navigation

  • My Journey
  • Accessibility
  • Next Steps

My Journey Learning to Code

I started learning to code a few months ago and it's been a wild ride!

Early Challenges

At first, syntax was really confusing.

Breakthroughs

Eventually things started to click.

Accessibility Matters

Today I learned that not everyone uses the web the same way I do.

Screen Readers

These tools help visually impaired users browse websites.

What's Next?

I'm excited to dive into JavaScript and build interactive features!

Coming soon: My first JavaScript project!

Stay tuned for some exciting interactive blog features.

Contact Me

Email me at camperbot@blog.io

tests.text: Tvoje prvo polje div za prvi post treba da se promeni u polje article.
Vaš drugi element div za drugi post treba da se promeni u element article.
Tvoj treći element od div za treći post treba da se promeni u element article.
tests.testString:
const thirdPost = document.querySelector("article + article + article");
assert.isNotNull(thirdPost);

description:
Na stranici bloga, postoji ukupno tri blog članka pokrivena unutar standardnih elemenata div. Međutim, bolje je koristiti semantičke elemente za pokrivanje svakog članka.

Promeni svaki element div koji pokriva svaki pojedinačni post u element article.
